title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #3 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Foot Colony" Temple of the International Philanthropy Federation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is a ton of loot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This way the rest of us all get bigger cuts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please stop!! That money was donated for poor children in need!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah right! If that's true, why hasn't it been turned over? You were gonna keep it, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! These bastards know everything about us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then we can't let them escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a few more pictures of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyaaah! These iron bars just sprung up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What we think to trap us, eh? I'll bust through! Outta the way,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The hell?! is the island sinking?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No... this is... an earth- quake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's gotta be his handi- work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gotta admit, I'm a bit jealous I can't do that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Interested in getting a power, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd better choose wisely if you seek one out. You'll be stuck with it for life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who was it??? Which one of you tried to ditch us down there?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell are you all doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You at least kept the treasure safe, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, Kyo-Kum! Thank goodness you survived; I was so worried about you!!!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Voha HA! New Challenges have shown up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Knock it off with the infightin'! This aint the time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should've been gettin' ready to ship off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was fast... did someone leak our plans?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Screw it... no point preppin' to sail now.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 62 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
